---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-16"
---

```{r}



library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)
library(MASS)
library(pscl)
library(broom)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)


base_dir <- "/Users/ericwang/Documents/Columbia CRR/Code/RERF_data"

out_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "rerf_baseline_model_pilot")
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

# Load solid cancer incidence data
solid_data <- read_csv(file.path(base_dir, "lssinc07.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
names(solid_data) <- trimws(names(solid_data))

# Clean negative dose codes
dose_vars <- c(
  "cola02w10",
  "stoa02w10",
  "thya02w10",
  "brea02w10",
  "liva02w10",
  "pana02w10",
  "blaa02w10"
)

dose_vars <- dose_vars[dose_vars %in% names(solid_data)]

solid_data <- solid_data %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(dose_vars),
      ~ ifelse(.x < 0, NA_real_, .x)
    )
  )

safe_var_mean <- function(x) {
  m <- mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.na(m) || m == 0) return(NA_real_)
  var(x, na.rm = TRUE) / m
}

get_pyr_var <- function(data) {
  if ("pyr" %in% names(data)) return("pyr")
  if ("py" %in% names(data)) return("py")
  if ("person_years" %in% names(data)) return("person_years")
  stop("No person-year variable found.")
}

make_pilot_data <- function(data, endpoint, dose_var,
                            low_min, low_max,
                            high_min, high_max) {
  
  pyr_var <- get_pyr_var(data)
  
  pilot <- data %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[endpoint]]),
      !is.na(.data[[dose_var]]),
      .data[[dose_var]] >= 0,
      !is.na(.data[[pyr_var]]),
      .data[[pyr_var]] > 0
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      outcome = .data[[endpoint]],
      dose = .data[[dose_var]],
      pyr_used = .data[[pyr_var]],
      dose_group = case_when(
        dose >= low_min & dose < low_max ~ 0L,
        dose >= high_min & dose < high_max ~ 1L,
        TRUE ~ NA_integer_
      ),
      dose_group_label = case_when(
        dose_group == 0L ~ paste0(low_min, "-", low_max, " Gy"),
        dose_group == 1L ~ paste0(high_min, "-", high_max, " Gy"),
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(dose_group)) %>%
    mutate(
      dose_group = factor(dose_group, levels = c(0, 1)),
      dose_group_label = factor(
        dose_group_label,
        levels = c(
          paste0(low_min, "-", low_max, " Gy"),
          paste0(high_min, "-", high_max, " Gy")
        )
      )
    )
  
  return(pilot)
}

summarize_pilot <- function(pilot, endpoint, dose_var, contrast_name) {
  
  pilot %>%
    group_by(dose_group, dose_group_label) %>%
    summarise(
      endpoint = endpoint,
      dose_var = dose_var,
      contrast = contrast_name,
      n_strata = n(),
      total_cases = sum(outcome, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_pyr = sum(pyr_used, na.rm = TRUE),
      incidence_rate_per_100k_py = total_cases / total_pyr * 100000,
      mean_count = mean(outcome, na.rm = TRUE),
      var_count = var(outcome, na.rm = TRUE),
      var_mean_ratio = safe_var_mean(outcome),
      zero_strata = sum(outcome == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      zero_pct = mean(outcome == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_dose = mean(dose, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_dose = median(dose, na.rm = TRUE),
      min_dose = min(dose, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_dose = max(dose, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

fit_baseline_models <- function(pilot, endpoint, contrast_name) {
  
  # Use common RERF covariates if available.
  possible_covars <- c("city", "sex", "agxcat", "agecat", "time")
  covars <- possible_covars[possible_covars %in% names(pilot)]
  
  # Minimal model: outcome ~ dose_group + offset(log(pyr))
  formula_min <- outcome ~ dose_group + offset(log(pyr_used))
  
  # Adjusted model
  if (length(covars) > 0) {
    formula_adj <- as.formula(
      paste(
        "outcome ~ dose_group +",
        paste(covars, collapse = " + "),
        "+ offset(log(pyr_used))"
      )
    )
  } else {
    formula_adj <- formula_min
  }
  
  # Minimal models
  pois_min <- glm(
    formula_min,
    family = poisson(link = "log"),
    data = pilot
  )
  
  nb_min <- tryCatch(
    glm.nb(formula_min, data = pilot),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  zip_min <- tryCatch(
    zeroinfl(
      outcome ~ dose_group | dose_group,
      offset = log(pyr_used),
      dist = "poisson",
      data = pilot
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  zinb_min <- tryCatch(
    zeroinfl(
      outcome ~ dose_group | dose_group,
      offset = log(pyr_used),
      dist = "negbin",
      data = pilot
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  # Adjusted models
  pois_adj <- tryCatch(
    glm(
      formula_adj,
      family = poisson(link = "log"),
      data = pilot
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  nb_adj <- tryCatch(
    glm.nb(formula_adj, data = pilot),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  # For zero-inflated adjusted models, keep zero part simple.
  if (length(covars) > 0) {
    count_formula_text <- paste(
      "outcome ~ dose_group +",
      paste(covars, collapse = " + "),
      "| dose_group"
    )
  } else {
    count_formula_text <- "outcome ~ dose_group | dose_group"
  }
  
  zip_adj <- tryCatch(
    zeroinfl(
      as.formula(count_formula_text),
      offset = log(pyr_used),
      dist = "poisson",
      data = pilot
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  zinb_adj <- tryCatch(
    zeroinfl(
      as.formula(count_formula_text),
      offset = log(pyr_used),
      dist = "negbin",
      data = pilot
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  
  get_aic <- function(model) {
    if (is.null(model)) return(NA_real_)
    AIC(model)
  }
  
  get_overdisp <- function(model) {
    if (is.null(model)) return(NA_real_)
    if (!inherits(model, "glm")) return(NA_real_)
    sum(residuals(model, type = "pearson")^2) / model$df.residual
  }
  
  comparison <- tibble(
    endpoint = endpoint,
    contrast = contrast_name,
    model_set = c(
      "minimal", "minimal", "minimal", "minimal",
      "adjusted", "adjusted", "adjusted", "adjusted"
    ),
    model = c(
      "Poisson",
      "Negative binomial",
      "Zero-inflated Poisson",
      "Zero-inflated negative binomial",
      "Poisson",
      "Negative binomial",
      "Zero-inflated Poisson",
      "Zero-inflated negative binomial"
    ),
    AIC = c(
      get_aic(pois_min),
      get_aic(nb_min),
      get_aic(zip_min),
      get_aic(zinb_min),
      get_aic(pois_adj),
      get_aic(nb_adj),
      get_aic(zip_adj),
      get_aic(zinb_adj)
    ),
    poisson_overdispersion = c(
      get_overdisp(pois_min),
      NA_real_,
      NA_real_,
      NA_real_,
      get_overdisp(pois_adj),
      NA_real_,
      NA_real_,
      NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
    arrange(model_set, AIC)
  
  # Extract dose_group effect from Poisson/NB adjusted models if possible.
  extract_effect <- function(model, model_name, model_set) {
    if (is.null(model)) return(NULL)
    
    tidy_model <- tryCatch(
      broom::tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    
    if (is.null(tidy_model)) return(NULL)
    
    tidy_model %>%
      filter(str_detect(term, "dose_group")) %>%
      mutate(
        endpoint = endpoint,
        contrast = contrast_name,
        model = model_name,
        model_set = model_set,
        rate_ratio = exp(estimate),
        rr_low = exp(conf.low),
        rr_high = exp(conf.high)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(
        endpoint,
        contrast,
        model_set,
        model,
        term,
        estimate,
        std.error,
        statistic,
        p.value,
        rate_ratio,
        rr_low,
        rr_high
      )
  }
  
  effects <- bind_rows(
    extract_effect(pois_min, "Poisson", "minimal"),
    extract_effect(nb_min, "Negative binomial", "minimal"),
    extract_effect(pois_adj, "Poisson", "adjusted"),
    extract_effect(nb_adj, "Negative binomial", "adjusted")
  )
  
  list(
    comparison = comparison,
    effects = effects,
    models = list(
      pois_min = pois_min,
      nb_min = nb_min,
      zip_min = zip_min,
      zinb_min = zinb_min,
      pois_adj = pois_adj,
      nb_adj = nb_adj,
      zip_adj = zip_adj,
      zinb_adj = zinb_adj
    )
  )
}

plot_count_distribution <- function(pilot, endpoint, contrast_name) {
  
  p <- ggplot(pilot, aes(x = outcome, fill = dose_group_label)) +
    geom_bar(position = "dodge") +
    labs(
      title = paste("Count distribution:", endpoint),
      subtitle = contrast_name,
      x = paste(endpoint, "cases per stratum"),
      y = "Number of strata",
      fill = "Dose group"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13)
  
  file_name <- paste0("count_distribution_", endpoint, "_", contrast_name, ".png") %>%
    gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_\\.]", "_", .)
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(out_dir, file_name),
    plot = p,
    width = 7,
    height = 5,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(p)
}

plot_rate_by_group <- function(summary_table, endpoint, contrast_name) {
  
  p <- ggplot(summary_table, aes(x = dose_group_label, y = incidence_rate_per_100k_py)) +
    geom_col() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Incidence rate by dose group:", endpoint),
      subtitle = contrast_name,
      x = "Dose group",
      y = "Cases per 100,000 person-years"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 13)
  
  file_name <- paste0("incidence_rate_", endpoint, "_", contrast_name, ".png") %>%
    gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_\\.]", "_", .)
  
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(out_dir, file_name),
    plot = p,
    width = 7,
    height = 5,
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  return(p)
}

# Choose pilot contrasts

pilot_specs <- tribble(
  ~endpoint, ~dose_var, ~contrast_name, ~low_min, ~low_max, ~high_min, ~high_max,
  
  "solid",   "cola02w10", "0_0p10_vs_0p10_0p20", 0.000, 0.100, 0.100, 0.200,
  "stomach", "stoa02w10", "0_0p10_vs_0p10_0p20", 0.000, 0.100, 0.100, 0.200,
  
  # Optional secondary contrasts.
  # These often have many strata and may be useful as sensitivity checks.
  "solid",   "cola02w10", "0_0p20_vs_0p20_0p50", 0.000, 0.200, 0.200, 0.500,
  "stomach", "stoa02w10", "0_0p20_vs_0p20_0p50", 0.000, 0.200, 0.200, 0.500
)

write_csv(
  pilot_specs,
  file.path(out_dir, "pilot_specs_tested.csv")
)

# Run pilot

all_pilot_summaries <- list()
all_model_comparisons <- list()
all_effects <- list()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(pilot_specs))) {
  
  spec <- pilot_specs[i, ]
  
  cat("\nRunning pilot:\n")
  print(spec)
  
  pilot_data <- make_pilot_data(
    data = solid_data,
    endpoint = spec$endpoint,
    dose_var = spec$dose_var,
    low_min = spec$low_min,
    low_max = spec$low_max,
    high_min = spec$high_min,
    high_max = spec$high_max
  )
  
  # Save analysis data
  write_csv(
    pilot_data,
    file.path(
      out_dir,
      paste0("pilot_data_", spec$endpoint, "_", spec$contrast_name, ".csv")
    )
  )
  
  # Summarize groups
  pilot_summary <- summarize_pilot(
    pilot = pilot_data,
    endpoint = spec$endpoint,
    dose_var = spec$dose_var,
    contrast_name = spec$contrast_name
  )
  
  all_pilot_summaries[[i]] <- pilot_summary
  
  write_csv(
    pilot_summary,
    file.path(
      out_dir,
      paste0("pilot_summary_", spec$endpoint, "_", spec$contrast_name, ".csv")
    )
  )
  
  print(pilot_summary)
  
  # Plots
  print(plot_count_distribution(pilot_data, spec$endpoint, spec$contrast_name))
  print(plot_rate_by_group(pilot_summary, spec$endpoint, spec$contrast_name))
  
  # Models
  model_results <- fit_baseline_models(
    pilot = pilot_data,
    endpoint = spec$endpoint,
    contrast_name = spec$contrast_name
  )
  
  all_model_comparisons[[i]] <- model_results$comparison
  all_effects[[i]] <- model_results$effects
  
  write_csv(
    model_results$comparison,
    file.path(
      out_dir,
      paste0("model_comparison_", spec$endpoint, "_", spec$contrast_name, ".csv")
    )
  )
  
  write_csv(
    model_results$effects,
    file.path(
      out_dir,
      paste0("dose_group_effects_", spec$endpoint, "_", spec$contrast_name, ".csv")
    )
  )
}

combined_pilot_summary <- bind_rows(all_pilot_summaries)
combined_model_comparison <- bind_rows(all_model_comparisons)
combined_effects <- bind_rows(all_effects)

write_csv(
  combined_pilot_summary,
  file.path(out_dir, "combined_pilot_group_summaries.csv")
)

write_csv(
  combined_model_comparison,
  file.path(out_dir, "combined_baseline_model_comparisons.csv")
)

write_csv(
  combined_effects,
  file.path(out_dir, "combined_dose_group_effects.csv")
)

# Create compact Igor tables

igor_summary_table <- combined_pilot_summary %>%
  mutate(
    total_cases = round(total_cases, 1),
    total_pyr = round(total_pyr, 1),
    incidence_rate_per_100k_py = round(incidence_rate_per_100k_py, 3),
    var_mean_ratio = round(var_mean_ratio, 3),
    zero_pct = round(zero_pct, 3),
    mean_dose = round(mean_dose, 4),
    median_dose = round(median_dose, 4)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    endpoint,
    contrast,
    dose_group_label,
    n_strata,
    total_cases,
    total_pyr,
    incidence_rate_per_100k_py,
    zero_pct,
    var_mean_ratio,
    mean_dose,
    median_dose
  )

igor_model_table <- combined_model_comparison %>%
  group_by(endpoint, contrast, model_set) %>%
  arrange(AIC, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(best_model_in_set = row_number() == 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    AIC = round(AIC, 2),
    poisson_overdispersion = round(poisson_overdispersion, 3)
  )

igor_effect_table <- combined_effects %>%
  mutate(
    rate_ratio = round(rate_ratio, 3),
    rr_low = round(rr_low, 3),
    rr_high = round(rr_high, 3),
    p.value = round(p.value, 4)
  )

write_csv(
  igor_summary_table,
  file.path(out_dir, "igor_pilot_group_summary_table.csv")
)

write_csv(
  igor_model_table,
  file.path(out_dir, "igor_pilot_model_comparison_table.csv")
)

write_csv(
  igor_effect_table,
  file.path(out_dir, "igor_pilot_dose_group_effect_table.csv")
)

# Save

sink(file.path(out_dir, "rerf_baseline_model_pilot_summary.txt"))

cat("============================================================\n")
cat("RERF BASELINE MODEL PILOT SUMMARY\n")
cat("============================================================\n\n")

cat("Pilot specs tested:\n")
print(pilot_specs)

cat("\nGroup summaries:\n")
print(igor_summary_table)

cat("\nModel comparisons:\n")
print(igor_model_table)

cat("\nDose group effects:\n")
print(igor_effect_table)

sink()

cat("\nDone. Outputs saved to:\n")
cat(out_dir, "\n")

```
